title: Flexible working | Employment New Zealand
content:
Flexible working arrangements can benefit everyone. Learn about types of flexible work including working from home, requesting flexible working and how to respond to a request for flexible working.
- Types of flexible work Employees can ask to change their work arrangements, place, hours or days.

## Types of flexible work
Employees can ask to change their work arrangements, place, hours or days.
- Asking for flexible working arrangements You have the right to ask your employer for flexible working arrangements. Your employer must consider your request but can turn it down if they have a valid reason.

## Asking for flexible working arrangements
You have the right to ask your employer for flexible working arrangements. Your employer must consider your request but can turn it down if they have a valid reason.
- Responding to a flexible working request If an employee requests flexible working arrangements, you must consider the request in good faith and reply in writing within 1 month. You can only decline a request for certain reasons.

## Responding to a flexible working request
If an employee requests flexible working arrangements, you must consider the request in good faith and reply in writing within 1 month. You can only decline a request for certain reasons.
- Working from home What to consider when employees are working from home some or all of the time.
What to consider when employees are working from home some or all of the time.
